---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea, tool addition, or improvement for this Android CI image.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you would like to see. -->

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
<!-- A clear description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm trying to run a specific linter during my Android build, but the required CLI tool is missing.") -->

## Proposed Solution / Requested Packages
<!-- 
Detailed description of the tool(s) or packages you want added. 
If requesting new Linux packages, please specify the exact package names if known (e.g., apk package names for Alpaquita). 
-->
* **Tool/Package Name:**
* **Use Case (How will it help Android CI builds?):**
* **Estimated Impact on Image Size (if known):**

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- A clear description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried (e.g., installing the tool manually via an entrypoint script or using a GitHub Composite Action step). -->

## AI Disclosure (Mandatory)
<!-- Per our CONTRIBUTING.md, you must disclose if AI was used to research or write this request. -->
- Did you use AI tools to generate or research this feature request? (Yes / No)
- If yes, which tool did you use and to what extent?

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, links to the tool's documentation, or examples about the feature request here. -->
